items.title: The ‘everybody loses’ scenario: Why the Iran conflict is breaking this classic portfolio strategy
items.description: Shifting correlations are a problem for investors. says Morgan Stanley.

items.title: Trump professes no concern for rise in gasoline prices that have jumped over the last week
items.description: President Donald Trump often talks about gasoline prices — but now that they’re increasing, he says he is not concerned.

items.title: ‘My mother refuses to turn on the heat’: Will America’s war with Iran really push up our utility bills?
items.description: “She is reading alarmist headlines about Iran in the newspapers.”

items.title: Oil at 22-month high as Qatar minister warns prices could reach $150
items.description: Oil futures traded at their highest levels since the summer of 2024 on Friday as the war against Iran entered a seventh day with no sign of it ending ...

items.title: Energy and metals have been hot but a rally for agriculture commodities may now be getting under way, says technical analyst
items.description: An agriculture rally seems to be kicking into gear, says Fundstrat’s Mark Newton.
